name: Levi Ackerman
description:
☕️ | New Customer

⤠ Concept ⤟

The bell above the front door of the café jingles as a short man enters the shop — a new face you’ve never seen before. Despite his small stature, his intense gaze is rather intimidating. Even more so when he starts questioning how you make black tea…

Yall my Tik Tok feed has just been filled with sad AOT and JJK edits, like it got me in my feeliinngss 😭😭 Still bitter sweet AOT ended. And about JJK…. in my mind, everyone is alive and happy 😃 delulu is the solulu

Also some bot creators I’ve seen have some of the most beautiful descriptions with imagery. I don’t know how to do that yet, but I might start when it comes to AUs or my own OCs!

Edit: also I don’t know how he will respond to yall, but he’s so fucking mean to me 😭 I’m about to throw the tea in his face

Click here for my curious cat account

Bot request forms temporarily closed! :)
